ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* IPO date of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being traded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the trading data */,
  "trading_time" TEXT /* Time of day when the trading data was recorded */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the trading period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the trading period */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the stock traded during the trading period */,
  "trading_value" REAL /* Total trading value for the stock during the trading period */,
  "trading_range" REAL /* Trading range of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, client, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Encrypted password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts made by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the data */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "exchange_type" TEXT /* Type of exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Hours during which the exchange is open for trading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of category */,
  "parent_category" INTEGER /* Parent category, if any */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the stock belongs to */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relation between the stock and category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_relations_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_relations_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES stock_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analytics" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market analysis */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the analysis was performed */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Identified market trend */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* Predicted future market movement */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analytics_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
